case_title: OKELLY AND SCHOENLANK VS COMETTA AND CIANFICHI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY OKELLY AND SCHOENLANK AS TO DEFENDANT COMETTA AND CIANFICHI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED RECEIPT TO PAUL CIAMFICHI/COMETTA AND CIANFICHI SHOWS ILLEGIBLE SIGNATURE.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OKELLY AND SCHOENLANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COMETTA AND CIANFICHI $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $12.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,012.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT COMETTA AND CIANFICHI
